backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Deeds ICP backend, defining all state maps (posts, profiles, comments, likes, follows, messages, notifications, live sessions, blogs, marketplace, albums, memory jars, report cards, etc.), their types, and access control initialization using a mixin-based storage pattern.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades actor state by adding an `isPublic` field to `MemoryJarEntry`, initializing empty `postsArchived` and `profileReportCards` collections from the old actor shape.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (Memory Jars, Profile page, deed categories, Profile Report Card, etc.) to their relevant frontend files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, hook, and page.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the favicon, viewport meta, description, theme color, and mounting the React app into `#root`.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for the Deeds app, defining name, display mode, theme/background colors, and a 192×192 maskable icon.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker (cache version v4) implementing network-first for navigation and JS/CSS bundles, cache-first for `/assets/`, and offline fallback for HTML pages.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up QueryClient, TanStack Router with all page routes, ThemeProvider, authentication gating via Internet Identity, and conditionally renders the ProfileSetupModal when no profile exists.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin dashboard component that verifies admin status via actor call and renders tabbed management tools including service status, storage cleanup, network, database, and system panels.
frontend/src/components/AllInOneHub.tsx: Hub page displaying a grid of navigation cards linking to all major app sections (Love Notes, Blog, Marketplace, etc.) with gradient styling and emoji icons.
frontend/src/components/BlogCard.tsx: Renders a single blog post card with author avatar, media preview, title, content excerpt, tags/categories, and like/comment/share action buttons.
frontend/src/components/BlogPage.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays all blogs sorted by newest first, with loading skeletons, an empty state, and a button to open the CreateBlogModal.
frontend/src/components/ChallengeCountdo: Displays a live countdown timer to midnight, updating every second, showing hours, minutes, and seconds remaining for the daily challenge.
Renders a list of comments for a given post with author avatars and timestamps, plus an inline form to submit new comments via the createComment mutation.
frontend/src/components/CreateBlogButton: Simple button component that toggles the CreateBlogModal open for creating a new blog post.
A modal dialog component for creating blog posts with fields for title, content, categories, tags, live toggle, and multi-file media uploads with preview and progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/CreateMarketplac: A modal dialog for creating marketplace posts with fields for title, description, location, contact method, category, post type (offer/need), and optional single media upload.
frontend/src/components/CreatePostButton: A button component that triggers the CreatePostModal for sharing a deed, styled with a gradient primary color.
A modal for creating deed posts with a caption, randomized category selection, optional photo/video upload, and visual filter options.
frontend/src/components/DeedOfTheDay.tsx: Displays the daily kindness challenge with participant completions, category labels, and a button to complete the challenge via a post modal; requires authentication.
frontend/src/components/DeedsBar.tsx: An animated canvas-based bar showing daily usage progress and remaining time, featuring floating icon animations and a lightning background effect.
frontend/src/components/DiscoverFeed.tsx: A feed component that displays all posts with filter tabs (For You, Trending, Videos, Photos) and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/Feed.tsx: Displays a filterable, sorted list of posts (all/videos/photos/text) with loading skeletons, an empty state, and a create post button for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/FollowersModal.t: Modal dialog that fetches and lists a user's followers with avatars and bios, showing skeletons while loading and an empty state if none exist.
frontend/src/components/FollowingModal.t: Modal dialog that fetches and lists users a given principal is following, with avatars, bios, loading skeletons, and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright year and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link with an animated heart icon.
frontend/src/components/FriendsStatusFee: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Gate.tsx: Landing/home page component with a hero section, feature cards, and trending blog previews; directs unauthenticated users to get started or explore.
frontend/src/components/GradeDeedsRating: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header with a logo, a dropdown navigation menu covering all major routes, and a login/logout button using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/HeaderMoreMenu.t: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/IconBadge.tsx: Reusable presentational component that renders a Lucide icon with optional label, supporting size and variant styling props.
frontend/src/components/KindnessMatchCar: Renders a single kindness match card showing a matched user's avatar, name, bio, compatibility score bar, shared deed categories, and a 'Say Hello' button that navigates to messages.
Page component that displays a hero banner and a grid of KindnessMatchCard components for the current user's top kindness matches, with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/LiveChatPanel.ts: Live chat panel for a streaming session that fetches and displays comments with user avatars, and allows sending new messages via a form input.
frontend/src/components/LiveFeed.tsx: Displays a grid of active live streaming sessions as cards with broadcaster info and a join button, plus a button to start a new live session via a modal.
Modal dialog for viewing a live stream session, showing a placeholder video area with viewer count and an embedded LiveChatPanel sidebar.
frontend/src/components/LockScreenOverla: Full-screen overlay that appears when the user exceeds a 19-hour daily usage limit, requiring them to click a bold word to acknowledge and dismiss it for the day.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Renders a login landing page for the Deeds app with Internet Identity authentication, displaying feature highlights and a login button with a loading overlay during the login process.
frontend/src/components/LogoShowcase.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/LoveNoteCard.tsx: Displays a single love note as a toggleable sealed/opened envelope card, showing the message and timestamp when clicked open.
frontend/src/components/LoveNotes.tsx: Provides a UI for sending anonymous love notes to strangers and viewing received notes, with a compose form and a list of received LoveNoteCard components.
frontend/src/components/Marketplace.tsx: Renders the marketplace page with filterable need/offer posts in a two-column grid, including a create post modal and loading skeletons.
Displays a single marketplace post card with media, title, category, description, author avatar, location, and offer/need badge.
frontend/src/components/MemoryJarPostCar: Renders a polaroid-style card for a saved memory jar entry, showing the post photo, caption, author, and a remove button on hover.
frontend/src/components/MemoryJarView.ts: Displays the user's Memory Jar as a grid of MemoryJarPostCards with a public-only filter toggle and remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/Messages.tsx: A messaging UI component that displays a list of followed users on the left and a chat conversation on the right, allowing the current user to send and receive messages.
frontend/src/components/ModerationWarnin: A simple alert banner component that displays a moderation warning with an icon and message to encourage positive content on the platform.
frontend/src/components/NotificationsPan: A dialog panel that lists user notifications sorted by timestamp, with the ability to mark individual notifications as read.
frontend/src/components/PhotoTextReelCar: An empty file with no content.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: A card component for displaying a single post with author info, media (photo/video), category badge, like/save/share/comment actions, and a collapsible comments section.
frontend/src/components/Profile.tsx: The user profile page showing avatar, stats (followers/following), posts, memory jar, and report card tabs, with modals for notifications, followers, following, and status updates.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for new users to set up their profile by entering a name and optional bio, which is saved via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
An empty file with no content.
frontend/src/components/ReelActionOverla: An empty file with no content.
frontend/src/components/ReelBottomNav.ts: An empty file with no content.
frontend/src/components/ReelBottomTabNav: An empty file with no content.
frontend/src/components/ReelHome.tsx: A TikTok-style vertical scrolling reel feed that displays posts as full-screen cards with auto-playing video or photo backgrounds, category labels, and a bottom tab navigation bar.
frontend/src/components/ReportCard.tsx: Displays a weekly report card for a user profile, computing a grade from posts, deeds, and likes using a configurable grading scale (letter, star, or percentage), with toggles for scale and public visibility.
Renders a threaded chain of ripple posts linked to a given post ID, showing author avatars and captions, with a button to add a new ripple via CreatePostModal.
frontend/src/components/SafeImageIcon.ts: A wrapper image component that catches load errors and renders a fallback icon or text instead of a broken image.
frontend/src/components/ServiceStatusChe: Admin-only component that checks backend canister connectivity and displays network and backend health status with a manual refresh button.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonBlog.tsx: Renders a skeleton loading placeholder styled to match a blog post card layout with avatar, title, text lines, and image grid.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonMarketpl: Renders a skeleton loading placeholder styled to match a marketplace listing card with header, image, metadata, and action buttons.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonPost.tsx: Renders a skeleton loading placeholder styled to match a standard post card with avatar, text lines, and a large image area.
frontend/src/components/Space.tsx: Static informational page describing the app's space/cosmic theme with two info cards about atmosphere and customization options.
frontend/src/components/StarEffectLogo.t: Renders a logo image with an animated canvas overlay that draws twinkling, orbiting star particles around the logo using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/components/StartLiveModal.t: A modal dialog component that allows users to start and stop a live streaming session, using mutation hooks and displaying live status with animated indicators.
frontend/src/components/StartupRecoveryS: A full-screen recovery UI shown when the app fails to load, offering a cache-clearing and service worker reset action via `performFullRecovery`.
frontend/src/components/StorageCleanup.t: A UI component that triggers a backend storage cleanup operation (removing orphaned blobs), showing progress and status feedback to the user.
frontend/src/components/TopLevelErrorBou: A React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled render errors and displays a fallback UI with an error message and a reload button.
frontend/src/components/UpdateAvailableB: A floating banner that notifies users of an available app update and provides options to update or perform a full cache recovery if the update is blocked.
frontend/src/components/UpdateStatusModa: A modal dialog that lets users update their profile status text and optionally attach an image or audio file, submitting via profile and status update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileModal: A modal dialog component that displays a user's profile, including avatar, bio, follower stats, and posts grid, with follow/unfollow functionality using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/WeatherBackgroun: A canvas-based animated background component that renders rain or snow particle effects and CSS gradient backgrounds based on the current weather condition and time of day.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for multi-language support (10 languages), exposing the current language, a setter, and a translation lookup function backed by a static translations map.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeedsUsage.ts: A hook that tracks the current session duration (updated every second) and cumulative daily app usage (persisted to localStorage, updated every 10 seconds).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, providing a React context and hook with login, logout, and status tracking, including delegation validity checks and idle handling configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and types for all major data models (Post, User, Blog, Marketplace, etc.) and exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating data via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useServiceWorkerUpdat: React hook that detects available service worker updates, tracks stale cache state, and provides an `activateUpdate` function while guarding against infinite reload loops.
frontend/src/hooks/useWeather.ts: React hook that fetches real-time weather data from the OpenMeteo API using the user's geolocation, with a fallback to time-based day/night defaults, refreshing every 10 minutes.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, and adds a fade-in animation utility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/swRecovery.ts: Provides utility functions for service worker recovery, including clearing caches, unregistering workers, activating waiting workers, and a full recovery flow with cooldown and reload-loop protection.
frontend/src/utils/swReloadGuard.ts: Tracks service-worker-triggered page reloads in sessionStorage and enforces a maximum of one reload per session to prevent infinite reload loops.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that enables dark mode via class, maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends typography and border-radius, and registers the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Defines the project state for 'Deeds', a kindness-focused social media app, including feature list, known issues, architectural notes, and image requirements. Tracks versioned features such as Memory Jars, Profile Report Card, Deeds Bar, and deed categories.
